before_value: C00 and C01 lacked normative phase coverage
after_value: Rule-level phase audit; explicit C00/C01 and ALL_PHASES coverage.

before_value: Bootstrap lacked complete source precedence and companion identity
after_value: Added exact precedence, companion names, hash behavior, and reference-only status.

before_value: Branching statement was ambiguous
after_value: Separated release-lineage branching from intra-cycle branching.

before_value: Executable surface terminology was ambiguous
after_value: Changed to machine-interpretable declarative execution surface and stated no program code.

before_value: Oper, Operature, Operome, and InterfaceMachine were not closed in PDF terminology
after_value: Added canonical definitions and named destinations.

before_value: Base/Personal PDF precedence was implicit
after_value: Added explicit layer precedence and conflict contract.

before_value: Single Base PDF could be mistaken for a complete boot package
after_value: Added REFERENCE_ONLY and STOP-PACKAGE-INCOMPLETE when loaded alone.

before_value: PDF accessibility and font embedding incomplete
after_value: Embedded fonts and kept 9 pt minimum; PDF/UA remains not claimed.

before_value: Full v2.21 transport was blocked by current substrate
after_value: Split one release into boot package and assurance companion; transport acceptance remains unproven.

before_value: Historical finding not represented in reconstructed package
after_value: Historical finding, migration and validation check restored
